# Operational Python attenuated-backscatter validation — benchmark stations

*Generated by `validation/paper/run_paper_validation.py`. The calibration (Rayleigh from L2_monthly + cloud from L2_daily), Kalman smoothing, water-vapour and wavelength corrections, screening, gridding and statistics are all the operational **Python** routines (no MATLAB). Statistics are over 500-3000 m AGL vs the reference channel; the MATLAB columns are the previous `R_*.mat` results for the same stations.*

> **Rayleigh** channels reproduce the MATLAB to the profile (N) and correlation (r). **Cloud** channels use the Python operational coefficient (C = 1/C_L, homogenised, m⁻¹ units → multiplier `1e-6/C`); their relative bias differs from the MATLAB cloud archive by the convention + the calibration-value difference (window-median Kalman vs the MATLAB full-archive recompute).

| station | channel | calib | Python relbias | Python r | Python N | MATLAB relbias | MATLAB r | MATLAB N |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| payerne | CHM15k (Rayleigh) *(ref)* | rayleigh | +0.0% | 1.000 | 79431 | +0.0% | 1.000 | 79431 |
| payerne | CL31 (cloud) | cloud | -88.1% | 0.495 | 79348 | +31.8% | 0.477 | 79348 |
| payerne | CL61 (Rayleigh) | rayleigh | +11.6% | 0.985 | 77522 | +1.7% | 0.987 | 77522 |
| amsterdam | CHM15k A *(ref)* | rayleigh | +0.0% | 1.000 | 36437 | +0.0% | 1.000 | 36437 |
| amsterdam | CHM15k B | rayleigh | +23.2% | 0.956 | 28884 | +24.0% | 0.956 | 28884 |
| amsterdam | CHM15k C | rayleigh | +3.0% | 0.925 | 32868 | -14.9% | 0.925 | 32868 |
| amsterdam | CHM15k D | rayleigh | -7.6% | 0.931 | 34196 | -15.6% | 0.943 | 34196 |
| uccle | CL51 (cloud) *(ref)* | cloud | +0.0% | 1.000 | 66068 | +0.0% | 1.000 | 66068 |
| uccle | CL61 (cloud) | cloud | +376.6% | 0.918 | 54365 | -2.9% | 0.944 | 54365 |
| sirta | CHM15k (Rayleigh) *(ref)* | rayleigh | +0.0% | 1.000 | 193058 | +0.0% | 1.000 | 193058 |
| sirta | CL31 (cloud) | cloud | -58.8% | 0.798 | 191232 | -16.4% | 0.813 | 191232 |
| sirta | Mini-MPL (Rayleigh) | rayleigh | -54.6% | 0.794 | 88063 | -45.5% | 0.789 | 88063 |
